title: Vaccine Distribution Planner
public_claim: Vaccine Distribution Planner is a public-health logistics planning tool for vaccination-site flow, staffing, throughput, and equity constraints.
distinctive_mechanism: It routes demand, risk groups, staff capacity, site bottlenecks, appointment flow, and distribution priorities through a planning sequence so the resource-allocation tradeoffs become visible.
use_value: It shows operational-design skill: the page is not about vaccines as a topic, but about turning public-health delivery into a measurable logistics problem.
